zh.lifeSummary: 當John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth於1485年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯時，他的父親Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur26歲，母親Joan Dinham42歲。他於大約1507年與Dorothey Capell在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年8月10日在他的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth于1485年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯时，他的父亲Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur26岁，母亲Joan Dinham42岁。他于大约1507年与Dorothey Capell在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1552年8月10日在他的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth was born in 1485, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur, was 26 and his mother, Joan Dinham, was 42. He married Dorothey Capell about 1507, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 10 August 1552, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth est né en 1485, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Dinham, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Dorothey Capell environ 1507, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 10 août 1552, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth 1485 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur 26 und seine Mutter Joan Dinham 42. Er hat um 1507 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Dorothey Capell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. August 1552 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth è nato il nel 1485 nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan Dinham, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Dorothey Capell circa 1507, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 agosto 1552, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworthが1485年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maurは26歳，母Joan Dinhamは42歳であった。約1507年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスでDorothey Capellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1552年8月10日に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth(이)가 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Dinham(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 Dorothey Capell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 8월 10일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth nasceu em 1485, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Dinham, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothey Capell aproximadamente 1507, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1552, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth родился в 1485 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Dinham, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothey Capell около 1507 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 10 августа 1552 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de La Zouche 8th Lord Zouche of Harringworth nació en 1485, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de la Zouche 7th Baron Zouche 8th Baron St Maur, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan Dinham, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Dorothey Capell aproximadamente 1507, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1552, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
